intro: Neobartsia fiebrigii, also known as the Fiebrig's neobartsia, is a plant species belonging to the Orobanchaceae family, commonly found in the Andean region of South America. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in the treatment of various ailments such as respiratory issues and gastrointestinal infections. The bioactive constituents of Neobartsia fiebrigii include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
